pageContext.name: Lord Zedd
pageContext.description: If the Mighty Morphin Power Rangers thought that Rita Repulsa was bad, they were in for a rude awakening once the mighty Lord Zedd arrived on the scene!  This 7 scale fully articulated Mighty Morphin Power Rangers ULTIMATES! Lord Zedd Figure features premium sculpting & deco and comes with interchangeable hands and Z-Staff, Growth Bombs, and Snake accessories. The only thing more frightening than Lord Zedd is the thought of a Mighty Morphin Power Rangers collection without him in it, so don't miss out on getting the made-to-order ULTIMATES! Lord Zedd Figure!
